cot: Lane change to the right due to construction decelerating our lane ahead with cones and a slow lead vehicle, using the available gap and then stabilizing after merging to proceed through the green-light intersection with safe clearance to the right curb and parked vehicles; then, gently slow for the intersection and upcoming crosswalk after completing the merge into the right lane.

Lane change to the right due to construction cones directly blocking our lane ahead and to merge safely with right-lane traffic, then slow for the work zone and upcoming signal-controlled intersection, with a right turn only after crossing the bike-lane merge zone if applicable; after clearing, merge back left to continue straight as the right lane becomes turn-only.
Lane change to the right due to construction cones moving traffic into the right lane ahead, blocking and slowing our current lane; then match speed with right-lane traffic after merging.
Lane change to the right due to construction cones ahead blocking and closing our lane, merging into the right-lane queue behind slow traffic and then slowing for the signal-controlled intersection.
Lane change to the right due to construction cones controlling traffic into a rightward merge lane ahead and slower vehicles in front, then decelerate to maintain a safe gap after merging.
Lane change to the right due to construction cones blocking for our lane ahead
